title: Add Blazor WebAssembly sample with core extended demos and GitHub Pages deployment
body: Adds a Blazor WASM sample app alongside the existing MAUI sample, implementing the three core `SkiaSharp.Extended` demos (not UI.Maui). ### New: `samples/SkiaSharpDemo.Blazor/` - **Shapes** — `DrawSquare`, `DrawTriangle`, `DrawRegularPolygon`, `DrawStar` via `SKCanvasView` - **Path Interpolation** — Animated morphing between SVG shapes using `SKPathInterpolation`, with slider + timer controls - **BlurHash** — Encode/decode images via `SKBlurHash`, with configurable components and punch parameters Uses `SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor` 3.119.1 and a project reference to `SkiaSharp.Extended`. BlurHash sample images are copied to `wwwroot/` and loaded via `HttpClient`. The sidebar navigation uses contextually appropriate icons (pentagon for Shapes, bezier curve for Path Interpolation, image for BlurHash) and includes an "EXTENDED" group header matching the MAUI sample's demo grouping pattern. ### Local development The source `index.html` uses `` so local development works out of the box with `dotnet run`. The CI workflow rewrites the base href to `/SkiaSharp.Extended/sample/` in the published output and generates `404.html` for SPA routing at deploy time — no manual path configuration needed for local dev. ### GitHub Pages deployment Updated `builds-docs.yml` to build and deploy the Blazor sample to `mono.github.io/SkiaSharp.Extended/sample/`: - **Publish step** — Runs `dotnet publish` for the Blazor WASM project and copies the output into `docs/_site/sample/` - **Base href rewrite** — CI rewrites `` to `` in the published output - **SPA routing** — `404.html` with redirect script is generated at deploy time (not in source) along with corresponding handler in `index.html` - **`wasm-tools` workload** — Installed in CI for optimized Blazor publish - **Deploy gate** — Deployment only occurs on push to `main` (gated by `if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'`); PRs build and upload artifacts but do not deploy - **`.nojekyll`** — Added to prevent Jekyll from ignoring `_framework/` directories - **Permissions** — Added `contents: write`, `pages: write`, `id-token: write` ### Copilot instructions - Added **Blazor Sample** section documenting the sample app and its GitHub Pages deployment - Added **PR Screenshot Requirement** section: PRs touching the Blazor sample or library features/controls must include screenshots of all affected Blazor sample pages as a PR comment - Added `SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor` to the Dependencies list ### Other changes - **`nuget.config`** — Added `nuget.org` source (`SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor` is not on the `dotnet-public` feed) - **`SkiaSharp.Extended.sln`** — Added project under `samples` solution folder - **`copilot-setup-steps.yml`** — Added `wasm-tools` workload installation alongside the existing MAUI Android workload ### Screenshots Home page with sidebar grouping and icons: --- ✨ Let Copilot coding agent [set things up for you](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp.Extended/issues/new?title=✨+Set+up+Copilot+instructions&body=Configure%20instructions%20for%20this%20repository%20as%20documented%20in%20%5BBest%20practices%20for%20Copilot%20coding%20agent%20in%20your%20repository%5D%28https://gh.io/copilot-coding-agent-tips%29%2E%0A%0A%3COnboard%20this%20repo%3E&assignees=copilot) — coding agent works faster and does higher quality work when set up for your repo.

comments.author: mattleibow
comments.body:
@copilot can you set up the pages pipeline to also deploy this Web app into a samples sub folder on the pages site. So basically mono.github.io/SkiaSharp.Extended/sample

Also, for testing now, let's also make PRs go live. This way we can test. This is not a super critical site at the moment so if something breaks we can just reset.

comments.author: Copilot
comments.body:
> @copilot can you set up the pages pipeline to also deploy this Web app into a samples sub folder on the pages site. So basically mono.github.io/SkiaSharp.Extended/sample
> 
> Also, for testing now, let's ...

Done in 0f54bbe. The `builds-docs.yml` workflow now:

1. Installs `wasm-tools` workload and runs `dotnet publish` for the Blazor sample
2. Copies the published output into `docs/_site/sample/` so it deploys at `mono.github.io/SkiaSharp.Extended/sample/`
3. Deploys on **all** pushes and PRs to main (removed the `refs/heads/main` gate)

Also configured the Blazor app for GitHub Pages hosting:
- `<base href="/SkiaSharp.Extended/sample/" />` in `index.html`
- `404.html` with SPA redirect script for client-side routing
- `.nojekyll` to prevent Jekyll from ignoring `_framework/` directories

comments.author: mattleibow
comments.body: @copilot can we update the copilot instructions to require that whenever we touch the Blazor sample or update some feature or control in the libraries, we also add screenshots of the affected and related pages to the PR ad a new comment. This way we can review and even look at change history. This must always be done.

comments.author: Copilot
comments.body:
> @copilot can we update the copilot instructions to require that whenever we touch the Blazor sample or update some feature or control in the libraries, we also add screenshots of the affected and rela...

Updated the copilot instructions in ce51807. Added two new sections:

1. **Blazor Sample** — Documents the sample app location and GitHub Pages deployment
2. **PR Screenshot Requirement** — States that PRs touching `samples/SkiaSharpDemo.Blazor/`, `source/SkiaSharp.Extended/`, or `source/SkiaSharp.Extended.UI.Maui/` must always include screenshots of all affected and related Blazor sample pages as a PR comment

comments.author: mattleibow
comments.body: @copilot please use different and more correct glyphs in the sidebar. Also, can you add grouping like we have in the Maui samples demo.

comments.author: Copilot
comments.body:
> @copilot please use different and more correct glyphs in the sidebar. Also, can you add grouping like we have in the Maui samples demo. 

Done in c37a98e. Changes:

**Sidebar glyphs** — Replaced the generic icons with contextually correct ones:
- 🏠 Home → house icon (unchanged)
- ⬠ Shapes → pentagon icon
- ⤴ Path Interpolation → bezier curve icon  
- 🖼 BlurHash → image/landscape icon

**Grouping** — Added an "EXTENDED" group header in the sidebar (matching the MAUI sample's `DemoGroup("EXTENDED")`) with subdued styling. Also added the same header on the Home page.

Note: Can't take live screenshots in this environment because the Blazor WASM `<base href>` is set to `/SkiaSharp.Extended/sample/` for GitHub Pages, which prevents local dev loading. The screenshots will be visible once the PR deploys to Pages.
